title: Comment
description: A free-text annotation attached to any addressable object identified by a URN.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

targetId.description: URN of the object this comment is attached to.

author.description: URN of the subject who wrote the comment.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the comment was created.

body.description: The comment text (plain text or Markdown).
